zh.lifeSummary: 當Dorothea Brass於1740年出生在美國紐約州納斯奧普斯亞德時，她的父親Adam Brass34歲，母親Sarah Cornelius30歲。她於1761年2月1日與Thomas White在美國紐約州納斯奧普斯亞德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1816年在加拿大新布隆士威省享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dorothea Brass于1740年出生在美国纽约州納斯奧普斯亞德时，她的父亲Adam Brass34岁，母亲Sarah Cornelius30岁。她于1761年2月1日与Thomas White在美国纽约州納斯奧普斯亞德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1816年在加拿大新布隆士威省享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: Brass
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Birse in Aberdeenshire, metathesized to Brass.
North German: nickname from Middle Low German brās ‘noise, pomp’, a related form of brāsch (see Braasch ).

variants.name: Brace
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French braz, brace, brase ‘arm’, probably used of someone with a strong arm or with a deformity of the arm.

nameMeanings.name: Dorothea
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of a post-classical Greek name, from dōron ‘gift’ + theos ‘god’ (the same elements as in Theodora , but in reverse order). The masculine form Dorotheus was borne by several early Christian saints, the feminine by only two minor ones, but only the girl's name has survived. In modern use in the English-speaking world it represents either a 19th-century Latinization of Dorothy or a learned reborrowing.

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: The First Constitution
historicEvents.description: Serving the newly created United States of America as the first constitution, the Articles of Confederation were an agreement among the 13 original states preserving the independence and sovereignty of the states. But with a limited central government, the Constitutional Convention came together to replace the Articles of Confederation with a more established Constitution and central government on where the states can be represented and voice their concerns and comments to build up the nation.

historicEvents.title: Albany is Named Capital of New York
historicEvents.description: Albany became the capital of New York in 1797. Albany is the oldest continuous settlement of the original 13 colonies.

historicEvents.title: Movement to Washington D.C.
historicEvents.description: While the growth of the new nation was exponential, the United States didn’t have permanent location to house the Government. The First capital was temporary in New York City but by the second term of George Washington the Capital moved to Philadelphia for the following 10 years. Ultimately during the Presidency of John Adams, the Capital found a permanent home in the District of Columbia.
France sells Louisiana territories to U.S.A.

en.lifeSummary: When Dorothea Brass was born in 1740, in Hempstead, Nassau, New York, United States, her father, Adam Brass, was 34 and her mother, Sarah Cornelius, was 30. She married Thomas White on 1 February 1761, in Hempstead, Nassau, New York, United States. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1816, in New Brunswick, Canada, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dorothea Brass est née en 1740, à Hempstead, Nassau, New York, États-Unis, son père, Adam Brass, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Sarah Cornelius, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas White le 1 février 1761, à Hempstead, Nassau, New York, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1816, à Nouveau-Brunswick, Canada, à l’âge de 77 ans.

Februar 1761 in Hempstead, Nassau, New York, Vereinigte Staaten Thomas White geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1816 im Alter von 77 Jahren in New Brunswick, Kanada.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dorothea Brass è nata il nel 1740 nel Hempstead, Nassau, New York, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, Adam Brass, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Sarah Cornelius, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Thomas White il 1 febbraio 1761, nel Hempstead, Nassau, New York, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1816, nel Nuovo Brunswick, Canada, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Dorothea Brassが1740年にアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州ナッサウヘンプステアドで生まれた時，父Adam Brassは34歳，母Sarah Corneliusは30歳であった。1761年2月1日にアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州ナッサウヘンプステアドでThomas Whiteと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1816年にカナダニューブランズウィック州で77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Dorothea Brass(이)가 1740년 미국 뉴욕 주 나소 헤프스테아드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Adam Brass(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Cornelius(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1761년 2월 1일 미국 뉴욕 주 나소 헤프스테아드에서 Thomas White(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1816년 캐나다 뉴브런즈윅에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dorothea Brass nasceu em 1740, em Hempstead, Nassau, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Adam Brass, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Cornelius, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas White em 1 de fevereiro de 1761, em Hempstead, Nassau, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1816, em Novo Brunswick, Canadá, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dorothea Brass родилась в 1740 г. в местности хемпстид, нассау, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени Adam Brass было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Sarah Cornelius, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas White 1 февраля 1761 г. в местности хемпстид, нассау, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1816 г. в местности Нью-Брансуик, Канада в возрасте 77 лет.
